nodes.label: This is NOT the Next.js you know
nodes.norm_label: this is not the next.js you know

nodes.label: RLS enabled on every table/bucket, deny-by-default
nodes.rationale: Security-critical app storing secrets; new table without RLS is treated as a hard error, not deferred work.
nodes.norm_label: rls enabled on every table/bucket, deny-by-default

nodes.label: Prisma Client bypasses RLS (trusted server-side only)
nodes.rationale: Prisma connects directly to DB and never passes through RLS, same trust level as service_role admin client — must be used only server-side with explicit justification, never as a per-user data access replacement for lib/supabase/server.ts.
nodes.norm_label: prisma client bypasses rls (trusted server-side only)

nodes.label: Supabase as single Auth/DB/Storage ecosystem
nodes.rationale: RLS works natively with auth.uid() across Postgres tables and Storage policies; a separate auth provider like Auth.js would require manual session-to-RLS mapping and a second source of truth for identity.

nodes.label: Hairline-border elevation (no drop shadows)
nodes.rationale: Dark canvas suppresses traditional shadow depth; translucent-white hairline borders and atmospheric glows carry elevation instead of blur/shadow.

nodes.label: Facts over reassurance (design principle)
nodes.rationale: Technical, security-conscious audience will see through generic SaaS trust-badge copy; persuade with concrete facts (encryption, RLS, token expiry, revocation) instead.

nodes.label: Monochrome chrome, color as event (design principle)
nodes.rationale: Nav/body/CTAs stay strict black-white so the pastel block-color palette in storytelling sections reads as deliberate narrative beat, not decoration.
nodes.norm_label: monochrome chrome, color as event (design principle)

nodes.label: Security is never just UI (design principle)
nodes.rationale: Every access-control/sharing affordance in the design must be backed by a real RLS policy or server check; interface must never imply protection the backend doesn't enforce.
nodes.norm_label: security is never just ui (design principle)
